headline: TE Connectivity (TEL) Is Down 5.9% After AI Data Center Revenue Outlook Jumps - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: TE Connectivity plc has recently affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.78 per share, payable on 11 September 2026, with both ex-dividend and record dates on 21 August 2026. Beyond this routine payout, investors are increasingly focused on TE Connectivity’s expanding role in AI-driven data center infrastructure, where AI-related revenue is set to rise from US$300.00 million to over US$800.00 million in fiscal 2025. Now we’ll examine how growing optimism around TE Connectivity’s AI data center...
